examples.text: But over the longer run small-scale farming can go only so far, especially in the face of climate change and population pressure
examples.explanation: 但从长远来看，小规模农业的发展是有限的，尤其是在面对气候变化和人口压力的情况下。

reviewSessions.example_text: But over the longer run small-scale farming can go only so far, especially in the face of climate change and population pressure
reviewSessions.feedback: 答案准确，和参考释义基本一致。
